summary: Iteration 18 (Pool Pulse live ticker + API/worker split): All acceptance items verified. Backend 13/13 new pytest pass + 13/13 iteration 17 regression pass (26/26 total). Frontend Pool Pulse renders on Global/Weekly/Premium tabs and is correctly hidden on Referrals tab. 4 seeded card_purchase events render with redacted handles (@First L.), country flags, card names in quotes, amount/+delta/time-ago. Today aggregate: $25.00 spend → +$12.50 pool delta (4 cards), matches seed data exactly. Pool total updated from $2,500 base → $2,512.50 = base + cards_cut $12.50. worker.py imports cleanly, server.py honours RUN_INGESTION env var (log confirmed: 'Cloudy Pitch ingestion jobs kicked off (RUN_INGESTION=1)').
critical_code_review_comments: PoolPulse.jsx silently swallows ALL errors in load() with `catch (_) {}` (line 65). Network failures, 500s, or malformed responses will leave stale UI without any user feedback. Consider surfacing a one-line 'feed offline' indicator in the corner when fetch fails N times in a row.

PoolPulse polls every 6s indefinitely with no visibility-aware throttling — keeps hitting backend even when tab is backgrounded. Recommend gating on document.visibilityState === 'visible' or using IntersectionObserver to pause when offscreen.

leaderboard.py /pulse endpoint runs TWO sequential mongo queries (wallet_transactions.find + users.find) + an aggregate for today's totals. For a polled-every-6s endpoint that fans out per session, consider caching today's aggregate for ~30s in-process or denormalising user handle/country onto wallet_transactions at insert time.

leaderboard.py /pulse has no upper bound on `limit` param — a client passing ?limit=100000 will fetch up to that many events (only naturally bounded by today's seeded 4 + any future tx). Cap to e.g. min(limit, 50).

_redact_display_name returns '@Anonymous' for missing/single-word/empty names, but does not strip multi-byte unicode emojis or zero-width characters that could be used to impersonate. Low priority but worth a `re.sub(r'[^\w\s.-]', '', first)` pass.

worker.py uses `os.environ.setdefault('RUN_INGESTION', '1')` after process start (line 48) — this is decorative since server.py is the only consumer of that flag and worker.py never imports server. Comment is fine but the line is dead code.

server.py lifespan still calls seed_admin() and seed_all() on EVERY container boot, including the worker (when worker is run under the same module structure — though worker.py thankfully skips this). With horizontal scaling of the API container, multiple replicas will race on the seed_all() write. Make seed_all() idempotent and/or guard with a distributed lock (Mongo findOneAndUpdate({locked:false}, {locked:true})).

verification_evidence.pulse_endpoint: GET /api/leaderboard/pulse?limit=10 → 200 {events:[4], today:{card_spend_usd_cents:2500, pool_delta_usd_cents:1250, purchases:4}}. Each event has handle '@First L.', country_code, amount_usd_cents, pool_delta_usd_cents (=amount//2), card_name, created_at.
verification_evidence.pulse_redaction: Handles confirmed redacted: @Cloudy A., @TEST U., @TEST S., @Dup T. — no full last names exposed.
verification_evidence.pulse_today_totals: 4 seeded card_purchase tx since 00:00 UTC: amounts 500+1000+250+750=2500 cents → 1250 cents pool delta (50%). Matches frontend display $25.00 / +$12.50 / 4 cards.
verification_evidence.pulse_empty_state: Frontend has data-testid='pulse-empty' fallback ('Be the first to buy a card today and fuel the pool.') — code path verified, though seed has 4 events so didn't trigger in this run.
verification_evidence.frontend_tab_visibility: PoolPulse mounts on Global/Weekly/Premium tabs (data-testid='pool-pulse' present), HIDDEN on Referrals tab (selector returns null). Verified by switching all 4 tabs sequentially.
verification_evidence.frontend_animations: CountUp animates today_spend → $25.00 and today_delta → +$12.50 on mount. First event row has lime tint background (bg-cp-lime/10). Lucide Zap icon with animate-ping pulse indicator visible.
verification_evidence.worker_import: `python -c 'import worker'` from /app/backend completes without exception. Module exports `main` coroutine and registers SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers.
verification_evidence.server_run_ingestion: server.py reads os.environ.get('RUN_INGESTION', '1'). Log evidence: 'Cloudy Pitch ingestion jobs kicked off (RUN_INGESTION=1)' present in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log. API-only branch ('API-only mode (RUN_INGESTION=0); ingestion handled by worker container') exercised via source inspection.
verification_evidence.iteration17_regression: All 13 iteration 17 tests still pass: unified leaderboard (global/weekly/premium scopes), prize-split math (with/without cards cut), referrals separate, NBA playoffs structure, /api/matches /api/wc/games/today /api/fantasy/players /api/predictions/upcoming /api/wallet/me /api/cards.
verification_evidence.pool_total_updated: Frontend pool card shows total $2,512.50 = $2,500 base + $12.50 cards cut (50% of $25 today spend). Backend /api/leaderboard cards_cut_usd_cents=1250 confirmed.

seed_data_creation: None — used the 4 card_purchase wallet_transactions pre-seeded by main agent (Cloudy Admin $5, TEST User $10, TEST Signup $2.50, Dup Test $7.50).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 18 acceptance items verified. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration18.py (13 tests). Pool Pulse selectors: [data-testid='pool-pulse'] (root), [data-testid='pulse-today-spend'], [data-testid='pulse-today-delta'], [data-testid='pulse-feed'], [data-testid='pulse-event-{i}'], [data-testid='pulse-delta-{i}'], [data-testid='pulse-empty']. The 6s poll fires once on mount (verified) — full polling timing wasn't measured per instructions. worker.py wasn't started in sandbox (would conflict with running API ingestion poller); only verified clean import. Production Docker compose under /app/deploy was NOT run-tested. RUN_INGESTION env is the only toggle between API-only and ingestion containers — confirmed in source + boot log.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; all acceptance items verified.
